## Campaign

- Summary: Explore the revamped Code Breach, our tower defense game with a cyberpunk hacker aesthetic. Features immersive visuals, sound, and programming concepts visualized as towers. Play now!

## Brief

- Core message: The Code Breach game within CodeGrind has been completely redesigned with a cyberpunk hacker aesthetic, featuring enhanced visuals, sound, and interactive programming concepts visualized as defensive towers. This update combines programming education with engaging tower defense gameplay.
- CTA: Dive into the cyberpunk world of Code Breach and defend your system!
- Visual brief: Dynamic gameplay footage showcasing the cyberpunk aesthetic of Code Breach, highlighting the hacker theme, immersive sound effects, and towers representing programming concepts like ForLoop and IfCondition in action.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
